headline: Cloud for Good Acquires EMS Consulting, Expanding Salesforce Expertise and Impact to the Financial Services Sector
summary: Cloud for Good, a leading purpose-focused Salesforce consulting partner focused on the higher education, nonprofit, and state and local government sectors, today announced the acquisition of EMS Consulting, a firm specializing in Salesforce solutions for the financial services sector (FINS).

headline: Salesforce AI Agents Enter US Labor Department As Valuation Lags Targets
summary: Salesforce has deployed its Agentforce autonomous AI agents in the U.S. Department of Labor's National Contact Center. The rollout supports citizen interactions across 28 federal programs and is part of a broader, decade long modernization partnership. This deployment represents a large scale public sector use case for Salesforce's AI driven digital workforce tools. Salesforce, NYSE:CRM, is bringing its AI agent platform into a high profile federal setting at a time when its share price...
